# PERF-039 negative: select-default loop also calls time.Sleep as a backoff
lang: go
file: PERF-039-safe.go
---
package sample

import "time"

func Poll() {
	for {
		select {
		case <-workAvailable():
		default:
			time.Sleep(10 * time.Millisecond)
		}
	}
}

func workAvailable() <-chan struct{} { return nil }
